description_long: This is a metal ladder with a robust, industrial design, featuring two parallel side rails connected by six evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The side rails are constructed from rectangular metal tubing, providing strength and rigidity, and each end of the ladder has a distinctive hook-shaped extension, likely for secure mounting or hanging. The rungs are also made of metal and are welded perpendicularly between the rails, offering stable footholds. The finish appears to be a dark, matte or semi-gloss coating, possibly powder-coated for durability and corrosion resistance. The overall structure is open, with no additional safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails visible. This ladder is suitable for fixed wall-mounted use in urban environments such as garages, maintenance areas, or utility spaces.
description: A sturdy metal ladder with six horizontal rungs and hook-shaped extensions at both ends, finished in a dark, matte or semi-gloss coating. Designed for fixed wall-mounted use in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the six rungs and the hook-shaped extensions at both ends, emphasizing the ladder's width and open structure.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the rectangular cross-section of the rails and the pronounced hook-shaped extensions, with all rungs visible in alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the rungs and hook extensions, with a clear view of the ladder's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the straight alignment of the rungs and the hook-shaped ends.
